description:
Define the two data types in fz_ir:

```rust
pub struct CallsiteId {
    pub caller: FnId,
    pub block: BlockId,
    pub slot: EmitSlot,
}

pub enum CallsiteOutcome {
    Consumed { result: Descr },
    Inlined,
    Emitted { target: (FnId, Vec<Descr>) },
    Stalled,
}
```

Add round-trip helpers:
- `EmitterSite::callsite_id()` → drops the spec_key.
- `CallsiteId::with_spec_key(SpecKey)` → adds it back.

## Acceptance

- Types compile; no other code references them yet.
- Unit test: round-trip an EmitterSite ↔ CallsiteId.
- All 842 tests green.

## Removes

Nothing yet.
title: fz-CO.A.1 — CallsiteId + CallsiteOutcome types
